title: sabulina fastigiata
intro: Sabulina fastigiata, also known as Sea Sandwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a useful remedy for wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sabulina fastigiata include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Sabulina fastigiata can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including skin conditions, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
